title: Add Elfy AI to chat
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [Elfy AI](https://dmonink.github.io/Elfy-AI/) to chat
- Use Elfy AI to chat with an AI Discord bot via the Gemini API and generate AI images from text prompts using the Pollinations.ai API.

Fixes #12002

gist.headline: Elfy AI enters the chat
gist.blurb: A new community app has sprouted in the greenhouse. Elfy AI brings a Discord bot powered by Gemini and Pollinations image generation straight to your server.
gist.summary: Added Elfy AI, a Discord bot combining Gemini chat and Pollinations image generation, to the community apps directory.
gist.impact: Users can now discover Elfy AI in the Greenhouse and easily add AI text and image generation to their Discord servers.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee interacting with a cute elf-themed Discord bot in a cozy digital greenhouse setting.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny green elf hat, chatting with a cute chunky robot that has pointy elf ears. They are sitting in a cozy digital greenhouse with pixelated chat bubbles floating around them. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, nostalgic and emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny green elf hat, chatting with a cute chunky robot that has pointy elf ears. They are sitting in a cozy digital greenhouse with pixelated chat bubbles floating around them. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background.
